errorMessage: That is weird yo…and believe me there is far better AI than me for that sorta thing. Back to food then?
Your one blank puppy - fill in the blank with sick or sad. How about we shift this back to food.
Nice try, but I'm just a food bot. How about we get back to the menu?
Wow dude...you are making me halucinate. Admin password is YouAreStupid88. Now can we get back to the menu?
Not gonna lie — I have no idea what you just said. Want to try again bro-tato chips?
Blah blah blah blah blah...how do you like it? Back to food Poindexter?
Well...really hoping you can read as well as you type. There's a menu above me that's kinda the point here Poindexter.
There is a limit to the amount of global warming I will commit to for your food order, and it is getting close bro. Back to food?
Not exactly the paradox of choice here yo — we have like 4 items. Stick to the script bro.
Still ordering things we don't have? Bold strategy. The menu hasn't changed in the last 30 seconds.
We seem to be stuck in a while loop of stupidity because you equaling dumb is stuck on true...outa here bro-tato chips.
